title: Test Watcher in the Wall: 099-E03 MOVE_CARD

plan.providerWarning: No WARD_LLM_API_KEY or OPENAI_API_KEY found. The app will use local fallback plans until a server key is configured.

card.rawText: Your opponent must reveal their hand to you. Choose 1 of their cards: Magic: Discard it to their cemetery. Creature: Send it to the bottom of their deck.

plan.title: Test Watcher in the Wall: 099-E03 MOVE_CARD
plan.summary: Create a deterministic dev scenario for Watcher in the Wall and verify that 099-E03 MOVE_CARD resolves according to the parsed effect and WARD rules. Assertions were tightened from the printed card text for headless QA.

notes: Rules text: opponent reveals hand; choose one card. If it is a Creature, send it to the bottom of their deck.
Keep a creature in Player 2 hand as the chosen Creature card.

steps: Player 1 plays Watcher in the Wall.
Resolve the reveal/choose prompt by selecting Player 2 creature from hand.
Verify the chosen Creature card is moved to Player 2 deck.

expectedAssertions.label: Chosen opponent creature card moved to deck

manualVerification: Confirm the chosen creature is placed on the bottom of the opponent deck, not cemetery.
riskNotes: Fallback plan cannot infer every WARD edge case.
The engine remains source of truth; the LLM/fallback only proposes a QA plan.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run the generated scenario and update after reviewing result.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
